    P

    patienceLevel - Variable in class RestaurantGame.GenericCustomer
     
    patienceLevel - Variable in class RestaurantGame.KnownCustomer
     
    patienceLevel() - Method in interface RestaurantGame.Customer
    Returns how long this customer will wait before leaving.
    patienceLevel() - Method in class RestaurantGame.GenericCustomer
    Returns the patience level which is how long this customer will wait.
    patienceLevel() - Method in class RestaurantGame.KnownCustomer
    Returns the amount of time in seconds that the customer will wait.
    PATIENT - Enum constant in enum class RestaurantGame.KnownCustomer.Personality
     
    Patty - Class in RestaurantGame
    Represents a Patty ingredient that changes its cooking state depending on how long it has been cooked.
    Patty() - Constructor for class RestaurantGame.Patty
    Default Patty constructor.
    Patty(double, double, String) - Constructor for class RestaurantGame.Patty
    Creates a Patty with custom price, prep time, and name.
    Patty.CookingState - Enum Class in RestaurantGame

    Returns score for patties in a burger based on how well they were cooked.

    Player object for this game

    Player object for this instance of restaurant game
    Player - Class in RestaurantGame
    CSC 335, Fall 2025 file Player.java: This class is creates a player for the Restaurant game.
    Player(String) - Constructor for class RestaurantGame.Player
    Creates a new player with a given name starting at day 0 with score 0.
    playerList - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantController
     
    PlayerList - Class in RestaurantGame
    This class stores players in a HashMap using their names as keys.

    creates an empty PlayerList with no players added yet.
